Corrections.PreviousClaim: No significant erroneous security claiming/incorrect data points verified, though mapping logic used for quote targeting could be further clarified for specific line numbers.
Corrections.CorrectedClaim: Run 2 established the existence and severity of two independent injection flaws (CWE-78) and zero-day condition data type boundary overflows (CWE-121) in current system code.

truthAudit.Summary:
Run 2 successfully identified critical injection flaws via configured 'system()' calls based on user-defined validator arguments (SC-V3-004), successfully identified an stack buffer overflow caused by an insufficient check in string assignments (SC-V3-005).

All claims regarding the vulnerabilities found in Run 2 (CWE-78 and CWE-120) were accurate according to the provided source code and corresponding Truth VCs. No prior false positives, overclaims, or misses were identified for the documented vulnerabilities.
